requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與SAE J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: FSM is a 60 Hz Americas-market environment with US-influenced electrical infrastructure. The practical EV connector baseline is SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC fast charging. Exporters should use J1772 / CCS1 as the FSM starting point and confirm the exact connector requirement with the site owner, state utility, vehicle fleet, or tender documents before production. GB/T connectors are not physically compatible with this connector ecosystem.
summary.zh: FSM属于美国体系60 Hz环境，电气基础设施延续美国风格。实际电动汽车接口基线为交流SAE J1772和直流快速充电CCS1。出口商应以J1772/CCS1作为FSM起点，并在量产前向场地方、州公用事业、车队或招标文件确认具体接口要求。GB/T接口与该生态在物理上不兼容。
summary.zht: FSM屬美國體系60 Hz環境，電氣基礎設施延續美國作法。實際電動車接口基線為交流SAE J1772與直流快充CCS1。出口商應以J1772/CCS1作為FSM起點，並在量產前向場地方、州公共事業、車隊或招標文件確認具體接口要求。GB/T接口與該生態在物理上不相容。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — EV and plug-in hybrid conductive charge coupler for AC charging
CCS Combo 1 / CCS1 — DC fast-charging connector used in the Americas market
UL 2251 — plugs, receptacles, and couplers for electric vehicles where specified
Project, vehicle-fleet, or state utility connector specifications

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and China DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers with GB/T 27930 communication. These connectors do not mate with SAE J1772 vehicle inlets or CCS1 inlets. DC conversion also changes protocol, cable assembly, thermal and safety evidence, labels, and service parts.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器并配套GB/T 27930通信。这些接口无法与SAE J1772车辆入口或CCS1入口匹配。直流转换还会改变通信协议、电缆组件、热与安全证据、标签和备件。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器並配套GB/T 27930通訊。這些接口無法與SAE J1772車輛接口或CCS1接口匹配。直流轉換亦會改變通信協議、電纜組件、熱與安全證據、標籤及備件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — DC charger to battery management system communication

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger cannot be treated as FSM-ready. Conversion requires hardware redesign to SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC, including coupler, cable assembly, locking, control/pilot signaling behavior, DC communication, cooling interface where used, thermal-rise tests, labeling, manuals, and spare parts. Adapters are not a substitute for required FSM connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不能直接用于FSM。转换需要按交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1进行硬件重构，包括耦合器、电缆组件、锁定、控制导引行为、DC通信、适用时的冷却接口、温升测试、标识、说明书和备件。转接头不能替代FSM所需的接口设计。
gap.zht: 僅支援中國GB/T接口的充電樁不能直接用于FSM。轉換需要按交流SAE J1772及直流CCS1進行硬件重構，包括耦合器、電纜組件、鎖定、控制導引行為、DC通信、適用時的冷卻接口、溫升測試、標識、說明書和備件。轉接頭不能代替FSM所需之接口設計。

mandatory_status.target: Project-critical — SAE J1772 and CCS1 are the practical connector baseline for FSM 60 Hz island charging. Exact connector requirements must be confirmed in utility or CPO specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is China domestic and not a physical substitute for FSM J1772 / CCS1

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign. For FSM, design around SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC unless the specific project owner or state utility specifies otherwise. GB/T connectors cannot plug into J1772 or CCS1 vehicle inlets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件与协议重新设计。面向FSM时，除非项目业主或州公用事业另有规定，应围绕SAE J1772（交流）和CCS1（直流）设计。GB/T接口不能直接插入J1772或CCS1车辆接口。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬件與協議的重新設計。面向FSM時，除非項目業主或州公共事業另有規定，否則應圍繞SAE J1772（交流）與CCS1（直流）設計。GB/T接口不能直接插入J1772或CCS1車輛接口。
